metrics.title: Governance Atlas
metrics.textPreview: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › Dev ⌘ K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 4 CDE Registry 5 Net Revenue Finance · Finance Stewards Approved Gross revenue minus discounts and refunds; recognized per ASC 606. Source-of-record column: `finance_prod.curated.revenue_daily.net_revenue_usd`. 4 assets View lineage -> Active Customer Customer · Customer Stewards Approved A customer with at least one billable order in the trailing 90 days. Computed in `customer_360.gold.customer_profile.lifecycle_stage`. 7 assets View lineage -> Churn Propensity Customer · Customer Stewards Approved Modeled probability that a customer will churn in the next 30 days. Served via `customer_360.ml.churn_propensity_v3`. 3 assets View lineage -> Booking Revenue & Sales · Revenue Stewards In Review A confirmed order, regardless of recognition status. 6 assets View lineage -> Atlas AI Hi, Skyler. x ATLAS AI I answer questions about governed data using Unity Catalog metadata. I never read raw row values. Which domains have the lowest metadata coverage? ↗ Which critical assets are not certified? ↗ What changed in governance metadata recently? ↗ Which assets need stewardship attention? ↗ Atlas AI uses AI. Review for accuracy.
